faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Fresh Meadows typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground-level nests are usually at the lower end, while second-story or hard-to-reach nests in attics or trees may cost more. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day hornet removal service throughout Fresh Meadows when you call before noon. For emergency situations where hornets pose immediate danger, we can often arrive within 2-3 hours. Our technicians come fully equipped to safely eliminate the nest and treat the area to prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments that are safe for residential use around children and pets. Our technicians are trained in proper safety protocols and will advise you on any brief precautions needed during treatment. Most families can return to normal activities within a few hours of service completion.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger, build aerial paper nests, and are generally less aggressive unless their nest is threatened. Yellow jackets are smaller, often nest in ground cavities or wall voids, and are more aggressive. Wasps vary in size and build open-comb nests. Our Fresh Meadows technicians accurately identify the species and use the most effective removal method for each type.
